title: [kimi-review] b73f00a: [SEVERITY: low] Error message text changed from "packet too
description:
Commit: b73f00a6e
Message: fix(schc): improve short packet error in decompress_packet

Finding: [SEVERITY: low] Error message text changed from "packet too short:" to "packet too short for residue:". If any tests or downstream code match on the old message substring (e.g., `pytest.raises(SchcError, match="packet too short")` still works, but a match on the full old string would break), this could cause failures. The commit notes ruff passes but doesn't mention running the test suite — worth confirming no `match=` assertions depend on the exact old text.
